transcript.text:
(Today's dish...) Name
Jokbal* soybean paste stew...?! *Pigs' feet
(Chewy jokbal)
(and soybean paste soup have met!!)
(This dish's official name...)
(Have you heard of it? Jokbal suyuk*!) *Boiled meat
10 servings?
Nope, 12 servings!
(OK, 12 servings!!) Bon appétit! I haven't had this in a long time
(How will it taste...?)
(Jokbal is dancing inside my mouth...)
(Jokbal that is full of texture and the ever-so-refreshing soybean paste soup)
(And the big eater who enjoys it...)
(Heh)
(An amazing collab of jokbal and soybean paste soup)
(Let's get started now!) Wow, this is good

Hello, everyone
Today, I'm here at Seonyudo
And some time ago,
(She has already been here before...?) when I was filming for a show, there was a jokbal place that I ate at
Was it 3 years ago? I think it's been quite a long time
What, I just noticed this, what the heck is that! LOL
(Tzuyang, a mukbang YouTuber with 1.4 million subs, fell in love and ate 12 servings) Ta-da! Their signboard includes me in it
("Deungmalu Jokbal Research Center" Yeongdeungpo-gu, Seoul)
Hello, ma'am!
Long time no see, hehe
Oh! There's another picture right there!
- Over there too - Oh, there's more...?! Oh my!
(Tzuyang is plastered all over the restaurant)
How much can she eat?
Is her belly sticking out?!
(Tzuyang doesn't have a belly!) I said, "I touched it and it's not sticking out!"

(The jokbal kept lingering in her eyes...) The jokbal was so unique, so it made me think about it a lot
You should've come if you wanted some!
I live quite far away...
So I came here determined!
Oh, there are various kinds of jokbal here
(What is jokbal suyuk...?) I ate jokbal suyuk, because it was so unique
For jokbal suyuk,
I think it was 10 servings?!
We serve 4 servings at once
(Let's go!!!) You should eat 12 servings
(Her stomach does not make us doubt...) You can definitely eat that much
They said they already had 1 round of food before coming here that day
But you ate 12 servings, which surprised us...
(Come on, jokbal suyuk, she decided on 12 servings!) Alright, 12 servings!
Thank you
(Let's have a look at the jokbal suyuk)

(First, cutting the chewy jokbal off of the bone)
(Dismantling job is complete!)
(Then there is a soybean paste soup...?)
(They add the jokbal into the soup)
(and place a wooden board on top...?!)
(Place jokbal on top)
(There is soybean paste soup on the bottom, and warm jokbal on top...!)
(Along with chives...)
(Here are 12 servings) (Jokbal suyuk is complete!)
Oh, that looks delicious! Awesome
Here, thank you
Thank you
Wow, thank you
Oh, the bottom thing is soybean paste stew, right?
Light soybean paste soup!
Oh right right, it was really unique!!

On the bottom, there is soybean paste soup
And on top, the jokbal is placed like suyuk, how cool, right?
(Jokbal suyuk is looking so scrumptious than ever) Can you see how moist the jokbal is? Amazing
You can add kalguksu* in there later and eat it *Handmade chopped noodles
(So exciting) I can add kalguksu?! Oh, that sounds delicious
Bon appétit! I haven't had this in a long time
A sip of the soybean paste soup first!
It's a very refreshing and light soybean paste soup
- It's seafood broth - Oh, it's seafood broth?
(They revealed their secret...lol) Shouldn't you keep it a secret?!
We add 13 different ingredients in there
(They revealed their secret 2...lol) Really? This has 13 different ingredients?
(Next is chewy jokbal!) Let's get a piece of jokbal!
It's good...!
(Beware of binge-eating..!!) Oh, if I eat this with the soup, I think I can have it endlessly!
It's delicious

The collagen part is really chewy, seriously
This time, I'll dip it in salted shrimp!
Wow, it's extremely chewy...
And I'll get a bit of chives
It doesn't smell at all, and it's so good
Perilla leaf!
+ ssamjang* *Mix of red pepper paste and soybean paste
+ garlic
We seasoned the perilla leaves ourselves, so it's not salty, and it's sweet and sour...!
There was a sauce for chives too, should I dip it in here?
Dip it in nicely!
(Her eyebrows crinkle when something's good)
All the customers ask me
What do they ask?
"Is she fat? Does she have a belly?"
(Beep- She is human...!) "Does she go to the bathroom?" and stuff like that

Even men who eat well
will eat two plates with 4 people...
(Tzuyang is eating 3 plates!)
Feels like...
Oh no! Oh!
It fell in...!!
- It's okay if it falls in! - Oh, really?
Oh right, I also soaked it in here last time!
It's actually better
(Soaks it one more time!) Even if you soak it..
If you eat it with the chives,
it gets rid of the greasiness a little
and the texture becomes chewier!
What I love about this is,
I can keep the food warm as I eat,
and the meat itself is really chewy, not dry at all

(Wrap it in lettuce!)
(She's looking like she had about 3 bottles of soju the night before)
Wow, that's good
It doesn't smell gamey at all
The collagen sticks to the chopsticks, that's how chewy they are
With soybean paste
(Her eyebrows have come down very far)
That's why it's suyuk!
(NO) Ah!....
(Deep anger)
(Positive energy...) I'll eat it soaked like that..
Seriously, I love how the food is continuously warm!
Let's soak it in the soup once
(A complete soup shower this time...!) Dip it just a little
It's hot
Dipping it in like this is delicious too

I'll bring some chives to my front plate like this!
I think it's more delicious with chives! Wow!
Huh?
(There is a reason for everything...) There is a reason why they give you all this at once
Eating it together is really good
Oh, it's hot
Oh, it's hot
(Emergency Coke)
(Clearing all the remaining chives!)
Wow, that's good
I'll eat this first
and then since there's no heat here, I'll switch it with the one next to it
(1st plate, CLEARED!)
I'll do it for you!
Thank you
(Starts the second plate...!)

(Topping it with kimchi!)
You know those dried radishes there?
We dried them ourselves
You should try it
(Topping it off with dried radishes, just like the owner suggested) They dried this themselves
(Very delicious)
Wow, the dried radishes
I usually don't like them because they're bitter
But this isn't bitter at all, it's sweet and delicious
It's chewy
Tastes great
The dried radishes are really good
How could you eat like you're eating it for the first time?
(It's just so good...) It's so good, it's because it's so good
How long has it been (since you opened shop)?
By March of next year, it'll be 20 years...!!!

*Gasp*
Just here...
Yes, just at this spot!
Wow, it's been such a long time
My father used to run it
and it was passed down to us
And we thought "let's have a new take"
(The birth of jokbal suyuk!) and we made it like this!
Even that cutting board, we made it
The guy owner here drilled all the holes
(And so, you can enjoy jokbal suyuk continuously warm!) Steam comes out of these holes, so it keeps the food warm
It's really delicious
But this dried radish is really good!
(She said she didn't like dried radishes)
Oh, I love that it's warm, it's so good
The soup tastes even stronger!

That's why we keep refilling the soup for them
(Soup refill, that's awesome!) Oh, you can get a refill?
Oh, that's so tasty
If the top has gone cold,
you can fish out the ones on the bottom first
(Switch them like this) and then put the top ones down to make them warm
(This is how you switch them!)
I love how they cut the meat from the bone for you
Should I
(She's gonna soak all of these in...?) soak all these in?
- You can pour the meat in there - Oh, really?
(I'm excited..!) I'll pour it in here, just like jokbal stew
(Pours the jokbal without hesitation...!) I'll add it all in
Jokbal stew, awesome
(She feels the happiest right now lol) Thank you
It's my first time eating jokbal stew

Will it taste okay...? Ta-da!
(How does it taste..?)
It's too hot!!
But it's good!!
I just ate the meat part, and once I ate it with the soup,
it was so chewy and felt quite soft
(The problem is, it's too hot...) I can't eat it since it's too hot
(Let's let it cool)
(This) Should I heat it up for you?
Oh, yes, yes, yes! Thank you
(Up and down)
I thought they got rid of the jokbal bone
in the kitchen when making it,
but there is this jokbal bone in the soup!
(Fully satisfied!) This is so good!
(There is a clear color difference!) Once it simmered down, it's a completely different taste than the first one

It's totally like soybean paste stew!
Thank you
How many whole jokbals have I eaten before?
(She ate this much lol)
(Maintaining the warmth)
(Never takes one piece at a time)
Lettuce!
(One big wrap goes straight into her mouth...!)
(Getting soup from here / Getting meat from here)
How old are you?
I'm 26 years old!
When I came here before, I was about 23...
That's so young
(23-year-old baby era)
Dried radish!
(Next up is chives!)

(She's gathering jokbal suyuk again)
(Getting all of the leftovers!)
Oh, since I've done mukbang for quite a while,
a lot of the times,
(The food will turn cold as she eats...) the food would turn quite cold
But today, I enjoyed this warmly from the start to the end
You're still a great eater...
Watching you makes me salivate...!!
Since when did you start eating so well?
I ate like this since I was in middle school
Your physique isn't that big either
and you don't gain weight
(She's got a super great digestive system...) I digest food pretty quickly...
After eating all this, they said
(Kalguksu is waiting for me!) I can add kalguksu in here to make it more delicious, so I ordered it
(Add in the kalguksu noodles into the nicely boiled soybean paste soup!)

That looks so good
Wow, the soup is bound to be legit!
(The soup has brewed genuinely well)
(Let's have a taste of kalguksu!)
(The best...) It's my first time eating soybean paste kalguksu, and it's great
The kalguksu noodles are chewy and good
It feels like you're
soaking kalguku into soybean paste stew, and it's good
The meat!
(Soak the meat nicely in the soup) Let's pour a bit of the soup here
(Emergency Sprite)
Ohh, it's hot
I'll get a bit of the soup,
(The ladle is her spoon and her front plate...) place it here, and let it cool
(Beware of getting burned) You'll be in trouble if you don't let it cool
(Let's get all the remaining bits...)

When I'm eating a soup dish,
I like getting the soup
(Sharing a tip) on the ladle and putting the noodles in there
Oh, it's delicious eaten this way
(So delish!) Ooh, it's good
Last bite!
Wow, this has turned into cheonggukjang* now! *Soup with fermented soybeans
It was soybean paste soup, soybean paste stew, and now, cheonggukjang
(Cleared 12 servings of jokbal suyuk with Sprite)
Ma'am, I really enjoyed the meal!
- (Even after a long time, it was so good) - Thank you for enjoying it so much
I really enjoyed it!
I had a great meal once again!
